summary: Tested 2 critical mobile bug fixes: 1) Message input field visibility on mobile (390x844), 2) Modal scrollability on mobile. Both fixes verified working. Message thread now uses createPortal to render at document.body level with z-[9999], escaping main's z-10 stacking context. Input field confirmed at y=792, bottom=832 (within 844px viewport). Haul/ISO/Now Spinning modals have proper sticky footer submit buttons.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile bug fixes verified: 1) MessagesPage.js uses createPortal to render thread at document.body level, escaping main's z-10 stacking context. Thread has z-[9999] which covers navbars at z-[100]. 2) ComposerBar.js modals have scrollable content areas and sticky footer submit buttons. index.css has overflow: hidden on .modal-mobile-scale to preserve flex layout. Haul modal image preview capped at max-h-[200px]. Test account kmklodnicki@gmail.com has no records in vault - Now Spinning search returns 'no results in your vault'.
